item[1].address: Cayley Hall Loughborough University LE11 3TX
item[1].short_description: Located in the village, Cayley is at the heart of campus and close to lecture theatres, sporting facilities, the University Library and the Students' Union. It is named after Sir George Cayley, a Yorkshire baronet, who laid down the foundations of modern science aerodynamics. Cayley has a range of bedroom options available and offers catered meals Monday to Friday (15 meals per week).

item[7].address: Harry French (Court) Ashby Rd Loughborough LE11 3UN
item[7].short_description: Situated on a split site, on either side of Ashby Road, just 200 metres from campus. Harry French is a relaxed and friendly close-knit community, set in gardens and ideally situated for students who want to be near both town and campus. This hall is owned and managed by our partners, Unite Students. It is named after Dr Harry French, an engineer/physicist, Senior Pro-Chancellor and Chairman of Council 1981-1986. Harry French has a range of bedroom options available.

title: Accommodation Halls
text:
item[16].name: William Morris
item[16].type: hall
item[16].address: William Morris Hall Ashby Road Loughborough University LE11 3TQ
item[16].short_description: William Morris, otherwise known as 'Bill Mo', is situated across the road to the Students' Union only 200 metres from campus and is named after a 19th Century artist, designer, writer and socialist. 
William Morris has a large range of bedroom options available. This property is owned and managed by our partners, Unite Students.

item[16].days_catered: None
item[16].meals_per_week: None
item[16].services[0]: No bedroom cleaning
item[16].services[1]: Kitchens and communal areas cleaned weekly in standard flats and en-suite flats
item[16].services[2]: Communal bathrooms and toilet facilities cleaned weekly
item[16].facilities[0]: Two common rooms - Freeview TV area, pool table, table tennis etc. (facilities subject to change)
item[16].facilities[1]: The University network and internet access are available by both wired and wireless networks
item[16].facilities[2]: Mobile app operated launderette
item[16].facilities[3]: Bike sheds (bicycles stored at this hall are covered under the Unite block insurance policy)
item[16].facilities[4]: Situated close to the Students' Union on Ashby Road
item[16].facilities[5]: Limited parking available through Unite Students
